theme: fraud and abuse review queue with adaptive attackers
title: Deterrence Beat: Staffing the Review Queue Against an Unpredictable Swarm
strategies: uniform baseline: split every round's review budget evenly across all categories, ignoring both the forecast volume and the migration graph (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)

forecast-matching: allocate proportional to volume times harm value under the noise-free law, self-simulating the population forward -- well-informed and fully reactive, but spends its whole budget on a precise forecast, so it is fully exposed to the round's UNPREDICTABLE extra migration hop that the deterministic law cannot foresee

structural-floor + reactive top-up: power-iterate the public migration matrix (weighted by harm value) to find where migration pressure structurally accumulates, reserve a floor of the budget there every round regardless of that round's forecast, and spend the rest efficiently on the forecast

structural-floor + smoothing (strong): as above, but blend the reactive top-up SLOWLY toward last round's allocation so coverage never lurches to chase a single round's forecast wiggle -- robust to exactly where the unpredictable hop lands
